one_time_description: Drinking Water Class Action Settlement received in 2024
economic_notes: Nation has multiple government business enterprises under Tagi group including contracting, forestry, resources, resort, and blackwater services. Tin Toh Forest Products LLP reported a net loss of $851,903 in 2024. Tagi Contracting LP reported net earnings of $506,451. L'hai Ventures LP distributed $228,715. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing provided $616,389.
notes: 16 government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis under Tagi group and related entities. Equity loss from GBEs was $367,249 in 2024 vs gain of $926,621 in 2023. Significant drop in revenue from 2023 ($26.4M) to 2024 ($16.9M) largely due to $11.5M Carrier Sekani Tribal Council revenue in 2023 related to Pathways Forward. Drinking Water Class Action Settlement of $514,188 received in 2024 is a one-time item. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $6,170,665 + CMHC $34,920 + Province of BC $191,215 + Carrier Sekani Family Services $641,600 + Carrier Sekani Tribal Council $2,148,249 + PGNAETA $369,207 - note CSFS and CSTC are tribal/regional organizations not direct government but included as transfer-type funding; osr set as Other income $7,341,176 + Ottawa Trust Fund $34,712 = $7,375,888 if only pure own source counted. Accumulated surplus note 12 shows $60,177,723 for 2023 but statement of earnings shows $60,177,923 — minor discrepancy in notes.
